$comment: Upstream repos to watch for releases and significant changes. Managed by upstream-watch-helper.sh (t1426). Entry schema: {slug, description, relevance, default_branch, added_at}. State (last_release_seen, last_commit_seen, last_checked, updates_pending) stored in ~/.aidevops/cache/upstream-watch-state.json. Non-GitHub upstreams are tracked in the non_github_upstreams array for manual/scheduled checks.

repos.description: CLI proxy that reduces LLM token consumption by 60-90% via smart output filtering
repos.relevance: Token cost optimization for agent bash operations (git, gh, test runners). Evaluated in t1430.

repos.description: App Store Connect CLI — Swift CLI for managing iOS/macOS apps, builds, TestFlight, metadata, subscriptions, screenshots
repos.relevance: Primary CLI tool for App Store Connect automation. New releases add commands, API coverage, and agent affordances. Documented in tools/mobile/app-store-connect.md.

repos.description: Official agent skills for the asc CLI — per-command-group reference with flags, output schemas, error tables
repos.relevance: 27 skills covering auth, builds, TestFlight, IAP, subscriptions, code signing, reports, Game Center, Xcode Cloud. New skills extend agent capabilities.

repos.description: Community workflow skills for asc CLI — release flows, ASO audit, localization, RevenueCat sync, crash triage
repos.relevance: 22 higher-level workflow skills complementing the official per-command skills. New skills add orchestration patterns.

repos.description: macOS menu bar app monitoring AI coding assistant usage quotas (Claude, Codex, Gemini, Copilot, Kimi, Kiro, Amp)
repos.relevance: Visual quota monitoring complementing our headless model-accounts-pool rotation. New provider support and multi-account features (GH#86) directly relevant. Installed via brew cask in setup.sh.

repos.description: Native macOS app for iOS development with 30+ MCP tools — simulator management, App Store Connect, build pipeline
repos.relevance: Optional MCP server alternative to asc CLI. New MCP tools may extend our ios-simulator-mcp and xcodebuild-mcp coverage. Documented as optional in tools/mobile/app-store-connect.md.

non_github_upstreams.name: cloudron-base-image
non_github_upstreams.relevance: Base image for all Cloudron app packages. Version bumps change the verified inventory table in cloudron-app-packaging.md (Node.js, PHP, Python versions, available tools). Current: 5.0.0 on Cloudron 9.1.3.

non_github_upstreams.name: cloudron-official-skills
non_github_upstreams.description: Official Cloudron packaging/publishing/server-ops skills from git.cloudron.io
non_github_upstreams.relevance: Source for our 3 imported Cloudron skills. New commits may add addons, manifest fields, CLI commands, or build methods. Last imported: commit b247b124 (2026-03-01).

non_github_upstreams.name: cloudron-packaging-community
non_github_upstreams.description: Community Cloudron packaging assessment toolkit by LoudLemur/OrcVole
non_github_upstreams.relevance: Source of the two-axis scoring rubric, verified base image inventory, and assessment patterns we adopted. New commits may add assessed apps, refine scoring, or update base image findings.
